jsQR 1.4.0
==========

Source:       https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jsqr@1.4.0/dist/jsQR.js
Upstream:     https://github.com/cozmo/jsQR
License:      Apache 2.0

Downloaded:   2026-04-15
SHA-256:      bc40c8a15196236b2314db0856f72ca0b49980cd5413b8c852a7349f5fee0859
Lines:        10101
Size:         ~130 KB uncompressed (minified webpack bundle)

jsQR is a pure-JS QR code detection library used by QEV's phase 2
pairing UI to decode QR codes scanned from the device camera. It
runs entirely in the browser/WebView, no network access, no
server-side component.

The vendored copy is committed verbatim so the tauri-app runs with
ZERO runtime external fetches. If you need to update:

  curl -sL -o tauri-app/ui/vendor/jsQR.js \
      https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jsqr@1.4.0/dist/jsQR.js
  shasum -a 256 tauri-app/ui/vendor/jsQR.js
  # update this file with the new version + hash
